pages.purpose: The Guider product landing page with embedded live demo, install instructions, FAQ, and the Guider widget itself running in the corner.
pages.summary: A dark, serif-headline landing page. Hero promises an AI tour guide. Sections: How (3 cards), Install (tabbed code blocks), Demo (interactive Settings/Team/Billing/API-keys app), Privacy, FAQ, Footer. The Guider widget is pinned bottom-right.

interactive.label: Overview (demo sidebar)
interactive.purpose: Show Overview tab in the demo app
interactive.outcome: displays KPIs and an Upgrade plan button

interactive.label: Team (demo sidebar)
interactive.purpose: Show Team tab in the demo app
interactive.outcome: displays the team members table and Invite teammate button

interactive.label: Billing (demo sidebar)
interactive.purpose: Show Billing tab in the demo app
interactive.outcome: displays Update payment method, View invoices, Cancel subscription buttons

interactive.label: API keys (demo sidebar)
interactive.purpose: Show API keys tab in the demo app
interactive.outcome: displays the API keys table and Create new key button

interactive.label: Invite teammate
interactive.outcome: opens a modal with email input, role select, Send/Cancel buttons

interactive.label: Send invite
interactive.outcome: sends invite and closes the dialog

interactive.label: Cancel (invite dialog)
interactive.purpose: Close the invite dialog without sending

interactive.label: Update payment method
interactive.purpose: Update the credit card on file

interactive.label: Create new key
interactive.outcome: demo-only — would create a new key row
interactive.visibleWhen: demo API keys tab is active

visuals.label: Team members table
visuals.describes: Rows of teammates with name, role, last active, manage action

visuals.label: API keys table
visuals.describes: Rows of keys with name, created date, revoke action
visuals.visibleWhen: demo API keys tab is active

modals.purpose: Invite a teammate by email + role
